F

FIELD_SEPARATOR - Static variable in class timgutilities.textio.ChoiceDescription
Used by getText if the results should be separated
FILE - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.DirectoryEntry.Type
this DirectoryEntry relates to a file Files.isFile(Path) returns true)
FILE_ONLY - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.DirectoryListFilterType
Only returns DirectoryEntry instances for files when listing a directory
FILES_FIRST - Enum constant in enum class timgutilities.textio.DirectoryListOrderType
The result of a list directory operation will place files in the list before directories.
